title: About

title: About
text:
History of BRaVe
The first version of BRaVe, a fully static desktop-based version, was launched in 2014 and has seen continued use since then. More recently a mobile version, internally referred to as BRaVe 2, was piloted. In 2025, development began in BRaVe 3, a comprehensive rearchitecturing and rebuild of the system, replacing both version 2 and 3.

title: About
text:
Feature Roadmap
BRaVe is in active development, is currently undergoing testing, with an initial open-source release planned for April 2026.

title: BraVe Documentation Portal
text: This is the technical documentation site for BraVe, an open-source tool for humanitarian registration, deduplication, assistance, and referral.

title: BraVe Documentation Portal
text:
How to use this portal
To understand how to get up and running with BRaVe, and it’s hardware requirements and device compatibility, go to the Getting Started section.
The how-to guides, tutorials and technical reference material are available in the Documentation page. This content and layout of this site are inspired by the Diataxis approach, a framework for technical writing.

title: BraVe Documentation Portal
text:
Feature Roadmap
BRaVe is in active development, is currently undergoing testing, with an initial open-source release planned for April 2026.

title: BraVe Documentation Portal
text:
History of BRaVe
The first version of BRaVe, a fully static desktop-based version, was launched in 2014 and has seen continued use since then. More recently a mobile version, internally referred to as BRaVe 2, was piloted. In 2025, development began in BRaVe 3, a comprehensive rearchitecturing and rebuild of the system, replacing both version 2 and 3.

title: Tutorials
text: This section is a work in progress

title: Tutorials
text:
Tutorial 1: Your first registration
Learning goal: Understand the core registration workflow — creating a project, designing a form, enrolling a beneficiary, and viewing the record.

title: Tutorials
section: Tutorial 2: Setting up a field deployment
text:
Tutorial 2: Setting up a field deployment
Learning goal: Understand how BRaVe works in a real field context.

title: Tutorials
text:
Tutorial 3: Biometric enrollment and verification
Learning goal: Understand the biometric pipeline — enrollment, template extraction, matching, and deduplication.

title: Tutorials
text:
Tutorial 4: Assistance and referral
Learning goal: Understand how BRaVe tracks what assistance a beneficiary has received and how referrals between agencies work.
